author: tEc5
content: Found: e2e test surfaces pre-existing bug — client labels outbound issue with xb-ref:<target_id_i64> at crossbridge-client/src/main.rs:123, but the answer round-trip on the source side expects xb-ref:<source_uuid>. Per kickoff constraint 'FILE A SEPARATE ISSUE rather than fixing it in-band', filed as #18. Will mark the e2e test #[ignore] with a pointer to #18 so cargo test --workspace stays green; AC-8 (test passes) cannot be satisfied without fixing #18 — flagged in the kickoff report.
